mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_character WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_character WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND private_card = 0 AND owner_user_id IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_character WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND private_card = 1 AND owner_user_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT c.user_id, c.character_id FROM app_conversation c LEFT JOIN app_conversation_archive a ON a.user_id = c.user_id AND a.conversation_id = c.id WHERE a.id IS NULL GROUP BY c.user_id, c.character_id ) t

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT c.user_id, c.character_id FROM app_conversation c LEFT JOIN app_conversation_archive a ON a.user_id = c.user_id AND a.conversation_id = c.id WHERE a.id IS NULL AND c.updated_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY c.user_id, c.character_id ) t
SELECT COALESCE( ( SELECT counter_value FROM app_stats_counter WHERE counter_key = 'total_messages' ), ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_message ) )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT e.id AS row_id FROM app_generation_stat_event e UNION ALL SELECT t.id AS row_id FROM app_generation_task t LEFT JOIN app_generation_stat_event e ON e.task_id = t.id WHERE e.id IS NULL ) s

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT e.status FROM app_generation_stat_event e UNION ALL SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(t.status, ''), 'QUEUED') AS status FROM app_generation_task t LEFT JOIN app_generation_stat_event e ON e.task_id = t.id WHERE e.id IS NULL ) s WHERE s.status = 'SUCCESS'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_payment_order WHERE status = 'PAID'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents), 0) FROM app_payment_order WHERE status = 'PAID'

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(day_key, '%Y-%m-%d') AS dayKey, DATE_FORMAT(day_key, '%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS generations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('FAILED', 'STOPPED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failureCount FROM ( SELECT e.event_day AS day_key, e.status FROM app_generation_stat_event e
e.event_day >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
UNION ALL SELECT DATE(COALESCE(t.queued_at, t.started_at, t.finished_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)) AS day_key, COALESCE(NULLIF(t.status, ''), 'QUEUED') AS status FROM app_generation_task t LEFT JOIN app_generation_stat_event e ON e.task_id = t.id
e.id IS NULL
AND DATE(COALESCE(t.queued_at, t.started_at, t.finished_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
) s GROUP BY day_key ORDER BY day_key ASC

SELECT u.id AS userId, conv.conversation_count AS conversationCount FROM app_user u JOIN ( SELECT c.user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT c.character_id) AS conversation_count FROM app_conversation c LEFT JOIN app_conversation_archive a ON a.user_id = c.user_id AND a.conversation_id = c.id WHERE a.id IS NULL GROUP BY c.user_id ) conv ON conv.user_id = u.id ORDER BY conv.conversation_count DESC, u.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.id, c.name, COALESCE(v.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(v.dislike_count, 0) AS dislikeCount, COALESCE(f.favorite_count, 0) AS favoriteCount, c.private_card AS privateCard FROM app_character c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT character_id, SUM(CASE WHEN vote = 'like' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS like_count, SUM(CASE WHEN vote = 'dislike' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dislike_count FROM app_character_vote GROUP BY character_id ) v ON v.character_id = c.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT character_id, COUNT(*) AS favorite_count FROM app_character_favorite GROUP BY character_id ) f ON f.character_id = c.id WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY COALESCE(v.like_count, 0) DESC, COALESCE(f.favorite_count, 0) DESC, c.sort_order ASC, c.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
